steps.title: Find the constant ratio
steps.content:
The ratio of $k$ to $p$ is constant. Using $k=9$ and $p=8$:
$$\frac{k}{p}=\frac{9}{8}$$

steps.title: Apply the ratio
steps.content:
Set the same ratio when $p=504$:
$$\frac{k}{504}=\frac{9}{8}$$
$$k=504\cdot \frac{9}{8}=63\cdot 9=567$$
The answer is D.
